summary: Horizontal video. A Fox News Channel broadcast clip with 'FOX NEWS ALERT' chyrons covering the murder of Loyola student Sheridan Gorman. It includes on-the-street student interviews and the Gorman family statement. It is a cable news segment reposted, with no music track.
notable_text: ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT SUSPECTED OF MURDERING SHERIDAN GORMAN MAKES FIRST COURT APPEARANCE; GORMAN FAMILY STATEMENT
